error_signature: env vars ignored due to env-overrides
title: Environment variables ignored in task-runners container
symptom: When using a separate task-runners container, environment variables like NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN are ignored due to env-overrides in the default config.
applies_when: Environment variables are set at the container level
not_this_if: Using the default n8n configuration without modifications
root_cause: The default configuration for n8n's task-runners explicitly defines env-overrides that overwrite any environment variables set at the container level, leading to confusion and frustration for users trying to customize their setup.
fix_steps: Create a custom n8n-task-runners.json file with the desired configurations
Mount this custom file into the runner container at /etc/n8n-task-runners.json
agent_instruction: Mount your custom n8n-task-runners.json file into the task-runners container.
